cards.name: Obliterate
cards.description: this card obliterates, and completely resets your spell book.
cards.action: target.takeHit(1000, mission);mission.gameState.setAllVariableValues([{variable:'n', start:0, end:-1, local:false, value:false},{variable:'l', start:0, end:-1, local:false, value:false},{variable:'t', start:0, end:-1, local:false, value:false},{variable:'s', start:0, end:-1, local:false, value:false}]);
cards.comment: deals 1000 dmg to everything. Resets board -> everything to false or !#F(s|l|t|n)

cards.name: Fireball
cards.description: Deals 8 damage to a foe, also sets strength two rounds from now

cards.name: Strength
cards.description: Increases base attack by 3, also set the next two strength

cards.name: Aura of Weakness
cards.description: Decreases enemies' atk by 3

cards.name: Higher nature stand
cards.description: Deals 10 dmg to all enemies!

cards.name: Light stand
cards.description: Deals 4 dmg to all enemies!

cards.name: Heal stand
cards.description: Heals 15 dmg!

cards.name: Lightning stand
cards.description: Deals 15 dmg to all enemies!

cards.name: Lightning Strike
cards.description: Deals 10 damage to a foe but un-sets light this round
cards.comment: Deals 10 dmg to an enemy, also: ->!l

cards.name: Lightning rain
cards.description: Deals 25 damage to all enemies and sets light from now on
cards.comment: Deals 25 dmg to all enemies, also: ->

cards.name: Natural heal
cards.description: Heals you by 15 HP and sets the next two nature
cards.comment: eals player by 15 HP, also -> OOn&On

cards.name: Vase of Desire
cards.description: Draw 3 spell cards.
cards.comment: Should make you draw three cards

cards.name: Anti-evolution
cards.description: Deals 12 damage to a foe but unsets nature

cards.name: Dark beam
cards.description: Deals 25 damage to a foe but un-sets three light!
cards.action: target.takeHit(25, mission);mission.gameState.setAllVariableValues({variable:'l', start:0, end:3, local:true, value:false});mission.gameState.setAllVariableValues({variable:'t', start:0, end:3, local:true, value:true});

cards.name: Sun flare
cards.description: Deals 20 damage to all enemies, sets three strength & light
cards.action: target.takeHit(20, mission);mission.gameState.setAllVariableValues({variable:'s', start:0, end:3, local:true, value:true});mission.gameState.setAllVariableValues({variable:'l', start:0, end:3, local:true, value:true});

cards.name: Incinerate
cards.description: Deals 100 damage to an enemy but unsets all nature from now on!

cards.name: Unnatural heal
cards.description: Heals you by 50 HP but un-sets all nature from this round on!

cards.name: Guiding Light
cards.description: Augments Base attack by 1 and globally light
cards.comment: Base attack up by 1 and: -> Gl

cards.name: Lower woodland stand
cards.description: this stand deals 2 damage to all enemies!

cards.name: Root pierce
cards.description: 7 dmg to a foe, sets the next two transmute and next strength
cards.comment: deals 7 damage to a random foe
